content:
@Mike Rossiter @Rick Gleason @Rick Gleason

I have cleaned up the discussions we have had on the manual so the all now indeed lives in the "manual" stream. One reason is that we are about to use zulip also for other discussions which means that we cant use the "general" stream for manual discussions, it's just not logical. Another reason is that when we keep as topics the natural sorting works so that older messages are not that visible. MIke has also mentioned performance issues when subscribing to too many streams.

Lets keep the manuals in the new stream. It's just about the dialog when creating a new post: leave the "stream" box as it is, and create a new topic if required.

Please speak up if there are any problems!
